phase1_backbone_training.min_epochs_note: Introduced in Section 6.1 to prevent early stopping on the quiet 2016-2017 validation period before the model sees sufficient crash gradient steps. Section 5.2's diagnostic meta-learning comparison predates this fix and used no minimum-epoch floor.

phase3_tta.policy_note: Adapts once per crash episode using the rolling buffer of the last 20 crash-regime windows, then freezes until the regime changes. Boom-regime adaptation was tested but does not survive leak-corrected, cross-validated evaluation (Section 7.5) and is unused in the final policy.

regime_detection.sensitivity_analysis: Section 7.5 re-evaluates the primary result across a 4x3 grid (drawdown -8% to -15%, momentum 0% to 4%); the crash-DA gain remains positive (+6.8pp to +18.2pp) throughout.

baselines.lr_note: 1e-3 for PatchTST/DLinear/N-HiTS, 1e-4 for iTransformer/TimeMixer (higher LR caused premature convergence for these two).
